bottom_line: Item converged with no code defects; the main signal is S02 review agents hitting rate-limit ceiling before they could apply the stale `_currentAssistantEl` fix, wasting 6 retry attempts.
coverage_notes: All logs read in full. S09 (377KB runs) sampled tail-100; S10 fix logs full; S11 fix logs full. DB telemetry confirmed step statuses. No sampling needed for logs under 50KB.

findings.title: S02 review agents hit rate-limit ceiling preventing fix application
findings.recommendation: Track rate-limit exhaustion as a step-level retry trigger. When the agent hits the limit mid-fix-cycle, the platform should automatically re-queue the step with a delay rather than letting it exhaust all remaining attempts. Alternatively, increase the daily limit for review-agent steps resolving known fixes.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add rate-limit-aware retry backoff to step execution so review agents don't exhaust retry budget on rate-limit hits; analyzed in I-00087 (see ai-dev/active/I-00087/reports/I-00087_self_assess_report.md). Target file: orch/daemon/worktree_launch.py or orch/step_manager.py. Effort: M.

findings.title: S10 integration-test fix cycle (4 attempts) signals flaky or under-spec'd test
findings.recommendation: Investigate whether the integration test in S10 has ordering dependencies or external DB state requirements that cause flakiness. The empty run files (run1, run3, run5, run7 at 0 bytes) suggest the test framework may be failing to collect tests on certain runs.
evidence: I-00087_S10_fix4.log:1 — 59KB fix attempt (escalating size suggests evolving fix)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Investigate integration test flakiness in S10 — empty run files and 4 fix cycles suggest test collection failures or ordering dependencies; analyzed in I-00087 (see ai-dev/active/I-00087/reports/I-00087_self_assess_report.md). Target file: orch/test_runner.py or tests/integration/conftest.py. Effort: M.

findings.title: TDD RED evidence correctly captured in S03
findings.recommendation: Document in the iw-item-analyze skill that behaviour-implementing steps should verify RED evidence via the dedicated tests-impl step pattern. This item confirmed S03's RED test is valid (PRE_FIX_NAMED_EVENTS fixture missing 6 INTERESTING_EVENTS), and S01 correctly delegated RED to S03 as the prompt recommended.
evidence: I-00087_S03_run1.log:9 — "test_starter_listener_set_would_have_failed_protocol_check: PRE_FIX_NAMED_EVENTS fixture proves the pre-S01 set missed 6 events from INTERESTING_EVENTS"
